user.title: Set up HealthPush
user.description: Configure the HealthPush integration to receive health data from your iOS device.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this HealthPush instance (e.g. "My iPhone").
data_description.webhook_secret: An optional shared secret the iOS app will send to authenticate requests. Leave blank to disable authentication.

webhook_info.title: Webhook URL
webhook_info.description:
Configure the HealthPush iOS app with this webhook URL:

`{webhook_url}`

The integration is now ready to receive health data.
